name: Chocolate Layer Pie -- Low Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine flour and melted reduced calorie margarine in a 9-inch pie plate, spreading the mixture evenly over the bottom of the plate. Bake for 15-20 minutes, until golden. Remove from oven.
2. In a medium bowl, combine 2 tablespoons of the whipped topping, cream cheese, and confectioners' sugar; stir until smooth. Spread on top of the crust.
3. In another medium bowl, whisk together the reduced calorie pudding, milk, and 1/2 cup water until smooth. Spoon over the cream cheese mixture. Spread remaining whipped topping on top of the pudding mixture. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Variation: Try another flavor of pudding.
Source: Weight Watchers Magazine, February 1993
Per serving: 1 fat item, 1 bread item, 85 optional calories
Per serving: 154 calories
